hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$productDirs = @('Code', 'Code - Insiders', 'VSCodium', 'Cursor'); $pluginSuffix = 'agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'; $paths = @(); if ($env:APPDATA) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:APPDATA (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix)) } }; if ($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix)) } }; if ($HOME) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $HOME (Join-Path '.config' (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix))); $paths += (Join-Path $HOME (Join-Path 'Library/Application Support' (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix))) } }; $pluginRoot = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path $pluginRoot 'skills/session-startup/scripts/session-cleanup-detector.ps1') }"

pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$productDirs = @('Code', 'Code - Insiders', 'VSCodium', 'Cursor'); $pluginSuffix = 'agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'; $paths = @(); if ($env:APPDATA) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:APPDATA (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix)) } }; if ($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix)) } }; if ($HOME) { foreach ($productDir in $productDirs) { $paths += (Join-Path $HOME (Join-Path '.config' (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix))); $paths += (Join-Path $HOME (Join-Path 'Library/Application Support' (Join-Path $productDir $pluginSuffix))) } }; $pluginRoot = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path $pluginRoot 'skills/plugin-release-hygiene/scripts/plugin-release-hygiene-hook.ps1') }"
